name: 2026-05-17 Political Commentary Senate Coup Flood Control TH
description:
Six officials named for plunder and bribery in the Senate flood control inquiry. Three are sitting senators.

A week later, 13 senators voted to reorganize the Senate leadership. The blue ribbon chair running the investigation lost the gavel. Hearings paused.

Kailan pa ba?

The receipts went to the Ombudsman. Whether anyone actually moves on them is the next chapter.

A week later, 13 senators voted to reorganize the Senate leadership. The blue ribbon chair running the investigation lost the gavel. Hearings paused.

The receipts went to the Ombudsman. Whether anyone actually moves on them is the next chapter.

Six officials named for plunder and bribery in the Senate flood control inquiry. Three are sitting senators.

A week later, 13 senators voted to reorganize the Senate leadership. The blue ribbon chair running the investigation lost the gavel. Hearings paused.

Kailan pa ba?

The receipts went to the Ombudsman. Whether anyone actually moves on them is the next chapter.

Senate blue ribbon committee report on flood control corruption transmitted to the Office of the Ombudsman, naming 6 officials (3 sitting senators, 1 former senator, the House Speaker, 1 former representative) for possible direct bribery, antigraft, and plunder violations. Preceded by the May 11, 2026 Senate leadership reorganization that removed Sen. Lacson as blue ribbon chair and ousted Senate President Sotto.
